gauge.name: New River at Jacksonville (in MLLW)

impacts.statement: Widespread and significant flooding throughout downtown Jacksonville, with businesses and homes flooded. Many roads in the downtown Jacksonville area, near and south of Old Bridge Street, will be impassable with several feet of inundation.
Numerous homes and businesses will see flooding throughout downtown Jacksonville. Portions of Court Street, Shoreline Drive, and Bayview Drive will be inundated with water and may be impassable.
Minor flooding in downtown Jacksonville, flooding docks and yards adjacent to the New River, Wilson Bay, and other tributaries. Flooding along Shoreline Drive and near Wilson Bay Park.
Very low lying areas in downtown Jacksonville adjacent to the New River and other tributaries will see minor flooding.

gauge.forecastReliability: Graphical forecasts are not available during times of high water, forecast crest information can be found in the local WFO web page.
